paper.title: Effect of copper slag as a fine aggregate on the properties of cement mortars and concrete
paper.authors: Khalifa S. Al-Jabri; Abdullah H. Al-Saidy; Ramzi Taha
paper.material_system: copper slag cement mortars and concrete

evidence.evidence_text: Mortar component weights: cement 185 g, sand 555 g, water 74 g.
Concrete component weights: water 207 kg, cement 416 kg, fine aggregate 721 kg, 10 mm aggregate 338 kg, 20 mm aggregate 790 kg.
Mortar compressive strength at 3, 7, 28, 56 and 90 days for copper slag replacement levels.
Concrete strength table gives Fcu values for copper slag fine aggregate replacement mixtures.
Mortar cubes tested after 3, 7, 28, 56 and 90 days; concrete cubes tested after 7 and 28 days of curing.
